title: Spicy Moroccan Apricot Chicken
description: A flavorful and aromatic chicken dish with spicy Moroccan flavors and sweet apricot notes. Serve with fluffy rice or couscous.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil to the skillet.
Add the moroccan spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the spicy harissa and apricot jam, and stir to combine.
Simmer the sauce for 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve the chicken with the spicy apricot sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve with fluffy basmati rice.
